overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a gold convertible through Night City's futuristic highway system. The journey transitions from neon-lit covered expressways through graffiti tunnels to open elevated highways with views of the city skyline at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban expressway with neon advertisements and red structural beams

agents.ego_description: driving convertible steadily through covered neon-lit highway with digital billboards on both sides

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead maintaining distance in the same lane

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure covering the highway with red support beams
thick red-painted steel support columns lining the highway
large illuminated billboards displaying advertisements on the left wall
large illuminated billboards displaying advertisements on the right wall
glowing neon signs and lighting fixtures overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a gold convertible driving through a covered urban highway. Red structural beams and neon-lit digital billboards line the corridor, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. Other vehicles are visible ahead in the moderate traffic flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti-covered tunnel with blue neon lighting

events.description: enters narrow tunnel with blue lighting and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through narrow tunnel with blue ambient lighting

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead navigating the tunnel curve

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with graffiti and industrial textures
concrete tunnel walls featuring colorful graffiti art
horizontal blue neon tubes illuminating the tunnel
large green tiger face graffiti with Japanese text
exposed pipes and cables running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow, enclosed tunnel with blue neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls. The green tiger graffiti is prominent on the right wall. The environment shifts from the open covered highway to a more confined industrial passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and ascending ramp exiting the tunnel system

events.description: exits tunnel into open air at street level intersection
turns right at intersection and ascends ramp to elevated highway

agents.ego_description: navigating urban intersection and ascending ramp to reach elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black vehicle merging from the right at the intersection

entered.detail: street level intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks
overhead traffic lights showing red and green signals
modern commercial buildings at street level with illuminated windows
concrete overpass and ramp structures overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into an open urban intersection at street level. After navigating the intersection, it turns right and ascends a ramp, transitioning from the underground tunnel system to the elevated highway network above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through urban canyon with skyscrapers

events.description: merges onto elevated highway with tall glass buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway through the urban canyon, passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: green truck ahead maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: raised multi-lane highway with red painted lane markings
tall modern glass and steel office towers lining the highway
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
elevated monorail or train tracks running parallel to the highway
large digital screen mounted on the side of the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Now on an elevated highway, the vehicle travels through an urban canyon flanked by towering glass skyscrapers. The highway curves gently with monorail tracks visible overhead. The lighting mixes the remaining natural dusk with artificial neon from the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with clear view of distant city skyline and suspension bridge

events.description: lighting shifts to more natural dusk as highway opens up with clear sky view of the skyline

agents.ego_description: driving on open highway with expansive view of the distant city skyline and bridge structures

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: distant futuristic cityscape with towering spires and high-rise buildings
tall bridge support structure visible in the distance
metal safety barrier along the right edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the distant city skyline at dusk. The suspension bridge towers rise in the background while the vehicle continues along the elevated roadway. The lighting becomes more natural as the enclosed urban canyon gives way to open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a gold convertible as it transitions from a neon-lit urban corridor into an expansive open-air highway overlooking a futuristic skyline. It begins on a covered highway lined with red structural beams and digital billboards before the vehicle glides into a confined industrial tunnel characterized by blue neon lights and prominent tiger graffiti. The scene then shifts as the car exits the tunnel into a street-level intersection and ascends a ramp, leaving the underground system behind. As the vehicle reaches the elevated highway, it navigates a dense urban canyon of towering glass skyscrapers and overhead monorail tracks under a mix of dusk and artificial light. Finally, the environment opens up completely, revealing a panoramic view of distant suspension bridge towers and the city skyline beneath a darkening sky.
